epigraph.quote: Twider yanked the lead out of Simon's hand & chased sheep, got caught in bracken & re-captured. Bloody dog.

moments.place: Brook House Farm (hop farm, mid-Wales / Welsh Marches; location unresolved)
moments.quote: went to Brook House Farm for Simon to check on hop-picking machines.
Then we went to Legges [as] we'd failed to take stuff out of fridge at home.
We drove up to the 3rd lake in the Elan Valley, cycled down to the 2nd dam (which we reached 2 years ago). It was a nice ride

images.caption: How to Find Us — Rhayader, Wales

moments.place: Brook House Farm (hop farm; location unresolved)
moments.quote: In the van on the way to the farm now to pick up the smalls & keep them at 86 until Tuesday.
